calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-06-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Jason Jungreis; Clerk: V. Mack; Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Plaintiff representative Vanessa Portillo for Mercy Housing California is present.
Attorney, Daniel Bornstein, Esq., representing the plaintiff is also present.

Defendant Aminah Mitchell is present.
Attorney, Tyler Macmillan, Esq., representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

Per JPT Jungreis, the parties have reached a settlement agreement, which was NOT FILED.

This case did settle. The trial date of AUG-10-2009 is vacated.
